title: pteris quadriaurita var. blumeana
intro: Pteris quadriaurita var. Blumeana, also known as the four-leaved fern or Blume's chain fern, is a type of fern native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, due to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of Pteris quadriaurita var. Blumeana are typically dried and made into tea or infusions, and are also used in traditional remedies for colds and fever.
